titleStmt.title: SII 6.1138: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1138. (A.R. No. 358 of 1899). IN THE FIFTY-SECOND NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavatsarē gajaviyat nētrakṣamāsammitē vaiśākhē daśamīdinē ravitithau śrīsiṁhyaśailēśituḥ . Agrē
nityamakhaṁḍḍabhāsuramahādīpā¨rtthamatyuttamāḥ paṁcchāśat pramitā U dōhanavatī¨rggā lakṣaṇai¨rllakṣitāḥ . 1 śrī
mānēṣa jayaṁttabhūpatisutō matsyānvayōddīpakaḥ śrīgōpāḷakava¨rddhanō guṇanidhi¨rddāridravidrāvaṇaḥ . sākṣādvaiṣṇava
da¨rśanaikaniratō vikhyātakī¨rttiḥ svayaṁ prādāt vāṁcchitadānakalpakatarustvāsū¨ryyatārādhipaṁ . 2 matsyānvayamahī
bha¨rttura¨rjjunasyānnabhūpatiḥ . Anujastasya dha¨rmmōyaṁ va¨rttatāṁ va¨rddhatāmapi . 3 svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1208 gunēṁṭṭi
vaiśākha śukla daśamiyu nādivāramunāṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuni sannadhiyaṁddu nityamu nnakhaṁḍadīpamu
Ettuṭaku matsyavaṁśodbhava śrīnarasiṁhava¨rdhdhanuṁḍaina Oḍavādi A¨rjjunadēvamahārājula tammuṁḍu Anna
marāju tamaku Āyuraiśva¨ryyābhivṛdhdha śrīvaiṣṇava śrīyunuṁggalva nēṁbai mōdālanu Icci śrībhaṁḍaramuna dī
padaṁḍḍunaku kālōcitamūlyamu veṭṭeṁgnāna Ī dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāIgānu cellaṁggalayadi Ī dha[¨r*]mmuvu śrīvai
ṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syāddha¨rmaśśatru[¨r]nna kasyacit . śrī
Eṟiyabōyani sahitamugā dhārāpū¨rvvakamu cēśi Iccitimi .
Digital edition of SII 6.1138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
